heading: Onboarding for {repo}
subtitle: Generated from index of {count} files · last refreshed {relative}

confirmRegenerate.title: Regenerate the onboarding tour?
confirmRegenerate.body: This replaces the current tour with a freshly generated one from the latest repo index.

generate.title: Generate onboarding tour
generate.body: DevDigest indexes the repo, then writes a 5-section guided tour: architecture overview, critical paths, how to run locally, a guided reading path, and first tasks.

notIndexed.title: Index this repo first
notIndexed.body: The onboarding tour is generated from the repo index — index this repo before generating a tour.

loadError.title: Couldn’t load the onboarding tour
loadError.body: Something went wrong loading the onboarding tour.
